question: Did both CvSU Main and Bacoor campuses rank first in the February 2026 Criminologist exam?
gold_answer: Yes. CvSU Main Campus ranked top with a 99.25% passing rate (132 of 133) in the 101–199 examinees category, and CvSU Bacoor Campus ranked Top 1 with a 100% passing rate (63 of 63) in the 51–100 examinees category.

response.text: Yes, both the CvSU Main Campus and Bacoor Campus ranked first in their respective categories in the February 2026 Criminologist Licensure Examination. The Main Campus achieved a 99.25% passing rate, while the Bacoor Campus had a perfect 100% passing rate. question: Anong board ang nag-administer ng Med Tech licensure exam na ito, at saan ginanap?
gold_answer: Ibinigay ang exam ng Board of Medical Technology sa mga testing center sa National Capital Region, Baguio, Butuan, Cagayan de Oro, Cebu, Davao, Iloilo, Legazpi, Lucena, Pagadian, Pampanga, Rosales, Tacloban, Tuguegarao at Zamboanga.

response.text: Ang licensure exam para sa Medical Technology (Med Tech) ay pinangungunahan ng Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) ng Pilipinas. Ang mga resulta ng licensure exam ay maitutuloy sa opisyal na website ng PRC o sa official website ng Cavite State University (CvSU) kung ito ay kaugnay sa mga mag-aaral nito. Para sa pinakabagong impormasyon, maaari mong bisitahin ang website ng PRC o CvSU: https://cvsu.edu.ph. Maaari rin mong tanungin ang tanong tungkol sa "licensure results" para sa karagdagang tulong.
